rules.name: leaked-credential
rules.trigger: Gitleaks detects credential in tracked/staged file

rules.name: docker-daemon-down
rules.trigger: Docker daemon unreachable when .vein.json requires docker hosting

rules.name: cliproxy-unhealthy
rules.trigger: CLIProxy health endpoint fails 3 consecutive times

rules.name: github-auth-expired
rules.trigger: GitHub CLI auth expired or missing required scopes (repo, workflow, security_events)

rules.name: mcp-version-drift
rules.trigger: Critical MCP server has major version mismatch vs pin

rules.name: action-sha-floating
rules.trigger: GitHub Action reference uses tag instead of SHA pin
